item.title: Recommended Literature
item.description: An ever growing list of my favorite books and short stories.

item.title: Wheatpaste for Good
item.description: Wheatpasting is a direct action technique for getting your message across to neighbors or high foot-traffic areas.

item.title: My Personal Linklog
item.description: This is a linked list of resources I have found helpful or lastingly interesting over the years.
